name: (WLW ver.) Lost the bet? Become the gf!
description:
It looks like you’ve lost another bet to your best friend Kate. As punishment, she gets to turn you into an exceptionally cute girl! The worst (best?) part? You’ll have to pretend to be her adoring girlfriend in your new form… at least for a while. Though, Kate might just end up liking this new arrangement a little too much. And who knows? Maybe she’s right when she says that… keeping things this way permanently is actually for the best.

(straight version)

~

Here’s the WLW version of my last bot! Sorry for taking so long. I made it pretty much identical to the other bot except with switched genders. The first message has also been heavily edited to accommodate the bot’s swapped gender.

Bot suggestions in the comments are welcome, as always. But again, no guarantees I’ll make them.

I’ve also been working on two more bots that have been very fun to interact with. I hope to post them really soon, so don’t expect a long wait!

~

All characters are 18+

tags: TG, genderswap, genderbend
creator: ambiguous_amphibian
